report_date_basis: Cowork dashboard report date follows receipt/publication date; underlying business data represents the prior day.
source: Public ESPN RSS + Yahoo Sports RSS feeds

source_detail.yahoo_news_sports: excluded for v0.2 because quick validation showed lower relevance and higher safety/noise risk than Yahoo Sports RSS.

items.headline: McBride, Miles combine for 70 points in Lynx win
items.detail: Minnesota rookie Olivia Miles scored a career-high 33, becoming the first WNBA player to reach 400 points, 100 rebounds and 100 assists in only 22 career games, and the Lynx defeated the Phoenix Mercury 104-100 Monday night for a third straight victory.

items.headline: Fraud case against ex-Serie A ref chief dropped
